name: Valorant
description: A 5v5 character-based tactical FPS where precise gunplay meets unique agent abilities.

roles.name: Duelist
roles.description: Self-sufficient fraggers who create space for the team

roles.name: Controller
roles.description: Experts at slicing up dangerous territory to set their team up for success

roles.name: Sentinel
roles.description: Defensive experts who lock down areas and watch flanks

roles.name: Initiator
roles.description: Challenge angles by setting up their team to enter contested ground

maps.name: Ascent
tips: Control mid early for map dominance
Use Sage wall on B site for post-plant
A site has multiple entry points - coordinate pushes

maps.name: Bind
tips: No mid lane - use teleporters strategically
Hookah control is crucial for B site
Watch for aggressive A short pushes

maps.name: Haven
tips: Three sites require good rotation timing
C site long is vulnerable to operator picks
Save ultimate abilities for crucial rounds
Practice aim training daily for 15-30 minutes
Learn one agent per role before expanding

proStrategies.title: Default Setup
proStrategies.description: Spread across the map to gather information before committing to a site. Controllers smoke key areas while duelists take map control.

proStrategies.title: Fast Execute
proStrategies.description: Quick coordinated push with utility usage. Smokes, flashes, and entry fraggers move together to overwhelm defenders.

proStrategies.title: Fake and Rotate
proStrategies.description: Use utility and make noise on one site, then quickly rotate to hit the other site when defenders commit.
